response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a musical performance by the Hololive group 'FLOW GLOW'. 2. Identified the song title as '24K GOLD' from on-screen text. 3. Performed a web search for '24K GOLD Hololive song' to find metadata and lyrics. 4. Confirmed the song details and found the full lyrics. 5. Mapped the video into two scenes: the song performance and the post-performance talk. 6. Corrected the final scene end time to match the video duration.
response.global_summary: The video is an official music video performance of the song '24K GOLD' by the Hololive DEV_IS group FLOW GLOW, followed by a brief concluding pose segment.
